debug_info.goal:
I : FKS.Inputs
σ U V : ℝ
hT₀ : failed to pretty print expression (use 'set_option pp.rawOnError true' for raw representation)
hσ : σ ≥ 5 / 8
hσ' : failed to pretty print expression (use 'set_option pp.rawOnError true' for raw representation)
hU : failed to pretty print expression (use 'set_option pp.rawOnError true' for raw representation)
hV : V > U
⊢ FKS.s₀ σ U V ≤ FKS.Inputs.B₀ I σ U V

failed_attempts:
-- Decomposition via Abel summation + zero density bound
  have hU_pos : U > 0 := by linarith
  -- Step 1: Abel summation converts ∑ 1/γ into N(σ,V)/V + ∫_U^V N(σ,t)/t² dt
  have abel : s₀ σ U V ≤
    riemannZeta.N' σ V / V +
    ∫ t in Set.Ioo U V, riemannZeta.N' σ t / t ^ 2 := by
    sorry
  -- Step 2: Substitute zero density bound and evaluate integrals
  have zdb : riemannZeta.N' σ V / V +
    ∫ t in Set.Ioo U V, riemannZeta.N' σ t / t ^ 2 ≤ I.B₀ σ U V := by
    sorry
  exact le_trans abel zdb
